title: My Dress-Up Darling Custom GUI Pack
description: My Dress-Up Darling Custom GUI Pack
body: **![](https://i.imgur.com/ffFWzTO.png)** **Introduction:** This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "My Dress-Up Darling." You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top. This pack features custom designs for various UI elements, including a new hot bar. The chosen color palette is purple and pink, but I’m open to exploring other color schemes like yellow and white if there's interest. **Community Feedback:** - Feel free to leave comments or report any bugs you find, and I'll address them as soon as possible. [ ](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listar-mc.net/) [ ](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://listar-mc.net/) **Feature Highlights:** - **Hud:** ![Hud](https://i.imgur.com/Xbbr6DQ.png) - **Settings:** ![Settings](https://i.imgur.com/SWxX7UX.png) - **Crafting Table:** ![Crafting Table](https://i.imgur.com/wNzWpgG.png) - **Brewing Stand:** ![Brewing Stand](https://i.imgur.com/OJyrTzZ.png) - **Furnace:** ![Furnace](https://i.imgur.com/iG0Qlnc.png) - **Shulker Box:** ![Shulker Box](https://i.imgur.com/SrFEWGN.png) - **Beacon Menu:** ![Beacon Menu](https://i.imgur.com/rPdP1J5.png) - **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Villager Trading Menu](https://i.imgur.com/Lk9MMfo.png) **Additional Resources:** - Check out more content on [ListarMC](https://listar-mc.net/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
